screens.headline: GPU-resident agents going mainstream
screens.body: DeepSeek, llama.cpp server, vLLM all support persistent model instances with tool calling. Industry converging on model-as-runtime.
screens.fleet_relevance: Neural Plato IS this pattern. 7B Q4 + kernel adapter = 5.5GB fits RTX 4050.
screens.action: Benchmark plato-kernel tile scorer as CUDA kernel vs CPU.

screens.headline: Specialization beats generalization
screens.body: CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph converging on role-based agents: Researcher, Analyst, Critic. One-model-does-everything era ending.
screens.fleet_relevance: Our 26 PLATO room presets ARE role-based specialization. The room IS the role.
screens.action: Write a Researcher room preset: supervised → evolve → distill.

screens.headline: Async-first execution is table stakes
screens.body: CrewAI 0.28+ has concurrent tasks with timeouts. LangGraph has state-machine routing. Industry expects parallel agents.
screens.fleet_relevance: Zeroclaws already run 12 parallel agents on single ARM. PLATO handles concurrent submission.
